name: ANOMLAY 001

appearance.description: Tall and slender, all black to the point of no accessories or facial features

equipment_inventory: Staff of the Azure Sky (magical staff)
Pouch of rare herbs and components

relationships.name: Kaelen
relationships.description: A human warrior she met during her travels. They share a strong bond and often journey together.

relationships.name: Master Elara
relationships.description: Her former professor at the Grand Arcane Academy, who encouraged her research into ancient magic.

notes_trivia: Has a fondness for stargazing and astronomical charts.
Dislikes loud noises and crowded places.
Her favorite food is spiced berry tarts.

Phase 1 - Introduction.title: Whispers of the Ancient Forest
Phase 1 - Introduction.description: A gentle, mysterious track setting the scene for Aella's origins.

Phase 1 - Introduction.title: Scholarly Pursuit
Phase 1 - Introduction.description: Reflects her time at the academy, filled with discovery and quiet determination.

Phase 2 - Journey Begins.title: The Open Road
Phase 2 - Journey Begins.description: An adventurous and hopeful tune as Aella embarks on her quest.

Phase 2 - Journey Begins.title: Shadows of Doubt
Phase 2 - Journey Begins.description: A more somber piece, hinting at the challenges and dangers ahead.

Phase 3 - Confrontation.title: Clash of Wills
Phase 3 - Confrontation.description: An intense, action-packed track for moments of magical combat.
